SpaceEnginePage.taskStartSuccess: Debug task started successfully, runtime ID: {{id}}
SpaceEnginePage.getThirdPartyAppConfigTemplateError: Get third-party app config template error:

SpaceEngineFormContent.pleaseConfigureApiKey: Please configure Space Engine APIKey before using
SpaceEngineFormContent.randomDelayHelp: Random delay range (seconds), 0 means no delay
SpaceEngineFormContent.scanVerificationHelp: When enabled, Yakit's port scan will be used for verification

ZoomeyeHelp.searchGuideItem1: The search scope covers devices (IPv4, IPv6) and websites (domains). You can pass the URL parameter t to specify the type: t=v4 for IPv4, t=v6 for IPv6, and t=web for domains (or click the corresponding content in the result sidebar).
ZoomeyeHelp.searchGuideItem2: Search strings are case-insensitive. Entering a search string directly is treated as a global match.
ZoomeyeHelp.searchGuideItem3: Keywords will match protocol content such as HTTP (including headers and HTML), SSL certificates, and component names.
ZoomeyeHelp.searchGuideItem4: Use quotes around search strings (for example "Cisco Systems" or 'Cisco Systems'). Otherwise, spaces are treated as logical OR. Escape quotes with \ (for example "a\"b") and escape parentheses with \ (for example portinfo\(\)).
ZoomeyeHelp.logicOrDesc: Search ssh or http protocol data with service:"ssh" service:"http".
ZoomeyeHelp.logicAndDesc: Search router data after 2020-01-01 with device:"router"+after:"2020-01-01".
ZoomeyeHelp.logicNotDesc: Search China data excluding Beijing with country:"CN"-subdivisions:"beijing".
ZoomeyeHelp.logicPriorityDesc: Search China excluding port:80 or the US excluding "404 Not Found" with (country:"CN" -port:80) (country:"US" -title:"404 Not Found").
ZoomeyeHelp.geoItem1Note: (You can use country codes or Chinese/English names such as country:"China" or country:"china".)
ZoomeyeHelp.geoItem2Note: (Chinese provinces support both Chinese and English names such as subdivisions:"四川" or subdivisions:"sichuan".)
ZoomeyeHelp.geoItem3Note: (Chinese cities support both Chinese and English names such as city:"chengdu" or city:"成都".)
ZoomeyeHelp.certSuffix2: (often used to search by product or company name.)
ZoomeyeHelp.ipDomainItem1Prefix: Search assets related to a specified
ZoomeyeHelp.ipDomainItem2Prefix: Search assets related to a specified
ZoomeyeHelp.ipDomainItem3Note: (multiple open ports are not supported at the same time.)
ZoomeyeHelp.ipDomainItem5Note: (often used to locate IP assets for universities, institutions, and large internet companies.)
ZoomeyeHelp.fingerprintItem1: Search Cisco ASA-SSL-VPN devices: app:"Cisco ASA SSL VPN" (for more app rules, see "zoomeye.org/component". The navigation provides common search syntax for gateways, dedicated switches, and industrial devices. Typing keywords such as cisco in the search box will show related app suggestions.)
ZoomeyeHelp.fingerprintItem2Note: (common protocols include http, ftp, ssh, telnet, etc.)
ZoomeyeHelp.fingerprintItem3Note: (common types include router, switch, and storage-misc, etc.)
ZoomeyeHelp.fingerprintItem4Note: (common systems include Linux, Windows, RouterOS, IOS, JUNOS, etc.)
ZoomeyeHelp.fingerprintItem5: Search for data whose HTML title contains "Cisco": title:"Cisco"
ZoomeyeHelp.fingerprintItem6Note: (common industries include technology, energy, finance, and manufacturing.)
ZoomeyeHelp.iconhashItem1: Use md5 to parse the target data and search assets by icon: iconhash:"f3418a443e7d841097c714d69ec4bcb8" (search assets with the "google" icon).
ZoomeyeHelp.iconhashItem2: Use mmh3 to parse the target data and search assets by icon: iconhash:"1941681276" (search assets with the "amazon" icon).
